data.title: New England Patriots partner with Krispy Krunchy Chicken; fans can now enjoy Jumbo Chicken Tenders at Gillette Stadium.
data.description: Atlanta-based Krispy Krunchy Chicken®, a rapidly expanding brand in the convenience store sector, has secured the position of Official Fried Chicken of the New England Patriots and their venue, Gillette Stadium. Starting now, fans can savor Krispy Krunchy’s signature hand-breaded Jumbo Chicken Tenders at The Beacon within the stadium. This partnership promises to enhance the gameday experience with the brand's bold and flavorful menu offerings. Krispy Krunchy Chicken® is known for its high-quality and popular food options, making it a prominent choice for sports fans seeking a delicious meal while supporting their favorite team.

data.title: Mila, 5C, and Hypertec announce $250M AI research hub, strengthening Canada's global AI position.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Montreal, a strategic partnership was declared between Mila, 5C, and Hypertec to enhance Canada's dominance in artificial intelligence. Through this collaboration, a Sovereign AI Research Hub will be established in conjunction with the involvement of these three entities. This initiative aims to drive advancements in AI technology and strengthen Canada's position as a leader in this field.

data.title: NACDD announces 2025 Impact Award winners during Annual Business Meeting on Sept. 11 to celebrate diverse achievements.
data.description: In Atlanta on September 25, 2025, the National Association of Chronic Disease Directors (NACDD) unveiled the recipients of the 2025 Impact Awards at its Annual Business Meeting held on September 11. These awards highlight individuals making significant contributions to the field.

data.title: Bluewater Learning hires David Kelly as SVP of Strategy & Transformation, bringing over 25 years of experience.
data.description: Bluewater Learning, a prominent company in learning and talent development solutions, is pleased to announce the appointment of David Kelly as the Senior Vice President of Strategy & Transformation. With over 25 years of leadership experience, David will play a key role in driving change within the company. The appointment was made public on September 25, 2025, with Dallas being the location of the company.

data.title: Crypto market erases September gains as Bitcoin barely holds on, with a significant weekly decline dragging it into negative territory.
data.description: The crypto market experienced a harsh drop this week, leading to overall negative performance for September. This persistent trend continues to follow the seasonal pattern, with key numbers showing a significant decline.

data.title: Valor PayTech and 4LeafLabs collaborate to bring affordable POS solutions to small businesses nationwide.
data.description: In San Francisco, a notable collaboration has been announced between Valor PayTech, a leading payment gateway solutions provider, and 4LeafLabs, an emerging player in cost-effective point-of-sale (POS) technologies. This partnership brings 4LeafLabs' range of POS solutions to Valor PayTech's ISO network, providing access to innovative tools such as POS Lite. POS Lite is a user-friendly POS platform tailored for Android devices, featuring functionalities like inventory tracking, QR code-based ordering, support for multiple languages, and integrated loyalty programs. data.title: TD SYNNEX introduces PartnerFirst, a digital portal for partners, unifying platforms & capabilities.
data.description: A new program called TD SYNNEX PartnerFirst has been launched in Fremont, Calif., and Clearwater, Fla., aiming to enhance the customer digital experience. This initiative combines various platforms and capabilities under one unified framework.

data.title: University of Phoenix chosen for AAC&U Institute on AI, Pedagogy, and Curriculum with 174 other institutions.
data.description: Phoenix-based University of Phoenix has been chosen as one of only 175 institutions across the country to take part in the Association of American Colleges and Universities’ (AAC&U) 2025–26 Institute on AI, Pedagogy, and the Curriculum. This exclusive opportunity offers an eight-month online program aimed at assisting higher education institutions in effectively incorporating artificial intelligence into their teaching, learning, and business strategies. The program is designed to provide structured support for participants as they navigate the integration of AI technologies.

data.title: RK Logistics Group expands warehouse capacity in Phoenix to 158,000 sq ft, adding 80,000 sq ft of temperature-controlled space.
data.description: RK has expanded their storage and distribution capabilities in the greater Phoenix area with the addition of a new 80,000 square-foot, Class A temperature-controlled warehouse. This doubles their previous capacity to nearly 158,000 square feet, allowing them to better serve businesses in the region. The facility offers specialized logistics support for Phoenix's renewable energy sector and other growing industries.

data.title: Raman Bhaumik celebrates Texas Star Pharmacy's 5-year streak as Star Local Media's Best Pharmacy in Plano.
data.description: A pharmacy in Plano, Texas, led by pharmacist Raman Bhaumik, has been awarded the title of Best Pharmacy in Plano for the fifth year in a row by Star Local Media. This accomplishment highlights the pharmacy's commitment to patient well-being, tailored services, and its aim to be a reliable healthcare ally in the Plano area. Texas Star Pharmacy has prioritized personalized care since its establishment, focusing on individual needs and solutions to serve the community effectively.

data.title: GUNSENS unveils AI-powered Gun Threat Detection Platform at GSX 2025, reducing police response times from 18 mins to seconds.
data.description: In a recent press release dated September 25, 2025, GUNSENS unveiled its revolutionary AI-driven Gun Threat Detection Platform at GSX 2025 in New Orleans. The cutting-edge system prioritizes privacy while leveraging artificial intelligence to swiftly detect potential firearm threats. By significantly reducing police response times from the current 18-minute national average to just a few seconds, this innovative platform is poised to enhance public safety measures.

data.title: Scarlet by RedDrop named one of 2025 Most Fundable Companies by Pepperdine Graziadio Business School for high growth potential and mission-driven model, reaching over 1 million tweens and teens.
data.description: An emerging company specializing in period care products has recently been recognized for its rapid growth potential, mission-centered approach, and readiness for investment. Scarlet by RedDrop, a brand focusing on puberty care, has successfully engaged with more than 1 million preteens and teenagers. The company's achievements were acknowledged in Atlanta on September 25, 2025, showcasing its commitment to empowering young individuals.

data.title: Rancho Mission Viejo named among top wellness real estate developments globally by Global Wellness Institute.
data.description: Rancho Mission Viejo, also known as The Ranch, located in Mission Viejo, California, is recognized as a pioneer in the wellness community sector. It is among the 13 case study projects worldwide that are leading the way in creating positive impacts on individuals' well-being. This 23,000-acre master-planned community showcases the potential for holistic development and sustainable living practices. The Ranch aims to demonstrate how thoughtful design and community planning can enhance the quality of life for residents. Its innovative approach has garnered international attention and is setting a benchmark for future wellness-oriented projects globally.
